title: "indexedDbAppendLog()"

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Creates an IndexedDB-backed append-log storage tier.

## Import

```ts
import { indexedDbAppendLog } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage/browser";
```

## Signature

```ts
function indexedDbAppendLog(
	spec: IndexedDbBackendSpec,
	opts: IndexedDbAppendLogOptions<T> = {},
): AppendLogStorageTier<T>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `spec` | `IndexedDbBackendSpec` | spec value used by the helper. |
| `opts` | `IndexedDbAppendLogOptions<T>` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

A `AppendLogStorageTier<T>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { indexedDbAppendLog } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage/browser";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/storage/browser.ts`
